# FitLife Brands, Inc. - Better Nutrition for A Better Life

_FitLife Brands, Inc._

## Executive Summary

FitLife Brands, Inc.. serving commercial.

The site appears to address commercial customers or use cases.

## Services & Offerings

- OUR BRANDS NEW ARRIVAL Pump Fuel® ALL IN Insanity VIEW ALL PRODUCTS LEARN & EXPLORE Macronutrients 101 7 Core Principles To Help with Weight Loss (Don't ignore these) 5 Great Cardio Exercises For Beginners FitLife Brands, Inc.

## Markets & Use Cases

Primary customers: commercial.

- FitLife Brands | Shipping Policy Typically your order is shipped within 2 business days (8:30am-5:00pm CST, Monday-Friday) after you place the order, and you can expect to receive it in 3-7 business days depending on your location.

## Differentiators & Value Proposition

- Better Nutrition for A Better Life FitLife Brands provides health-minded individuals premium supplements to support weight loss, muscle growth, strength, endurance, performance, energy and much more.

## Proof Points & Testimonials

Explicit figures on the site: founded year: 2002.

# FitLife Brands, Inc. - Better Nutrition for A Better Life — Tools Assessment

Audited website: https://fitlifebrands.com
Run created: 2026-07-16T18:13:10.959225+00:00
Website crawl source: source_20260716_181039_959924_930012

## Executive Summary

FitLife Brands, Inc. - Better Nutrition for A Better Life. The assessment covers 10 website pages plus the local-presence, reputation, market, and site-health signals below.

**Top issues:** mobile LCP of 18.36s exceeds the 2.50s target; mobile performance score is 50/100; the site is not mobile-friendly.

**Not measured:** Google Reviews (GBP CID is required.); GBP Posts (GBP CID or title is required.); Review Sentiment (missing dependencies: google_reviews); Maps Competitors (GBP primary category is required.); search demand (ran, but none of the 10 seed keywords had measurable local volume).

## Priority Actions

- **HIGH** — Reduce mobile Largest Contentful Paint to 2.5 seconds or less. Evidence: Measured mobile LCP is 18.36 seconds. _(Source: PageSpeed)_
- **HIGH** — Fix the mobile experience before directing more visitors to the site. Evidence: PageSpeed classified the page as not mobile-friendly. _(Source: PageSpeed)_
- **HIGH** — Resolve critical accessibility failures identified by PageSpeed. Evidence: Failed audits: `[aria-*]` attributes do not match their roles; `[aria-hidden="true"]` elements contain focusable descendents; Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio.; Links do not have a discernible name; `[user-scalable="no"]` is used in the `<meta name="viewport">` element or the `[maximum-scale]` attribute is less than 5.. _(Source: PageSpeed)_
- **HIGH** — Resolve SSL certificate or HTTPS configuration issues. Evidence: Certificate verification failed: [SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: certificate has expired (_ssl.c:1081) _(Source: SSL Inspector)_
- **MEDIUM** — Add a clear contact form for visitors who are not ready to call. Evidence: Website crawl did not detect a contact form. _(Source: Website Crawl)_
- **MEDIUM** — Make the primary phone number machine-readable on the site. Evidence: Website crawl did not extract a phone number from visible page text. _(Source: Website Crawl)_
- **MEDIUM** — Improve mobile page speed before scaling paid or local search traffic. Evidence: PageSpeed mobile performance score is 50. _(Source: PageSpeed)_
- **MEDIUM** — Verify the business category and re-seed demand research from customer-facing service terms. Evidence: None of 10 tested keywords had measurable local volume; seeds included fitlife brands inc better nutrition for a better life near me, best fitlife brands inc better nutrition for a better life near me, fitlife brands inc better nutrition for a better life services. _(Source: Search Demand)_

## Strengths

No positive finding met the evidence threshold for this run.

## Consultant Narrative (AI-generated)

Narrative not generated: Narrative generation failed: RolyCode request failed 400: {"error":"Thread project \"\" is not configured."}

- Contact form: no

## Market & Visibility

- Search Demand: completed, but none of the 10 seed keywords had measurable local volume (seeds included: fitlife brands inc better nutrition for a better life near me, best fitlife brands inc better nutrition for a better life near me, fitlife brands inc better nutrition for a better life services, local fitlife brands inc better nutrition for a better life, …); confidence: low
- Maps Competitors: skipped — GBP primary category is required.
- AI visibility: 1 platforms tested; 1 citing the business; 1 recommendations; composite score 16.7
- Per-platform scores: rolycode: 16.7

## Website Health

- Mobile Core Web Vitals — LCP 18.36s (needs work vs 2.50s target); CLS 8.19897e-05 (pass vs 0.1 target); TBT 416ms (needs work vs 200ms target)

- SEO score (mobile): 100

- `customer_id` joins jobs/invoices to customers; `customer_name` is the denormalized display name.

- `service_id` joins jobs/invoices to pricing_history.
- `job_id` joins invoices to jobs.

# Callback SOP

**Company:** FitLife Brands, Inc.  
**version: 1**  
**Effective:** July 16, 2025  
**Expiration:** January 1, 2026

Purpose: Provide a consistent procedure for handling callbacks during the period covered by this SOP.

1. Receive the callback request through the available business communication channel.

2. Record the callback request using the information provided by the requester. Do not add information that was not provided.

3. Review the recorded request before returning the call to confirm that the available details are accurate and sufficient for the callback.

4. Return the callback using the contact information provided in the request.

5. Address the purpose of the callback using only the information available for that request. If the available information is insufficient, identify the missing information needed to proceed.

6. Record the callback disposition and any follow-up requirement using the information established during the callback.

7. Route any unresolved follow-up to the appropriate role within FitLife Brands, Inc. and retain the callback record for reference through the effective period of this SOP.

8. Apply this SOP as **Callback SOP v1** during 2025, effective July 16, 2025 through January 1, 2026.

# Callback SOP

**version: 2**  
**Effective date:** January 1, 2026  
**Supersedes:** Version 1

Purpose: Provide the standard procedure for managing a callback from receipt through completion and documentation.

1. Receive the callback request and acknowledge it promptly.

2. Confirm the caller's callback details and the reason for the callback before proceeding.

3. Review the relevant information available for the request so the callback is handled accurately and consistently.

4. Make the callback using the confirmed details. If the callback is not completed, record that outcome and arrange the next appropriate callback action.

5. Complete the callback request, communicate the applicable outcome, and document the interaction and any follow-up required.

6. Use this Callback SOP, version 2, for callbacks handled from January 1, 2026 through March 28, 2026.

7. Escalate any callback issue that cannot be resolved through these steps to Leadership for direction.

# Callback SOP

**Business version:** version: 3  
**Effective date:** March 28, 2026  
**Issued by:** Jared Hale

Purpose: The callback SOP defines the current company procedure for handling callbacks. This version is the effective callback SOP for 2026 and supersedes the prior version.

## Procedure

1. **Use the current SOP.** Treat Version 3 of the callback SOP, effective March 28, 2026, as the governing procedure for callback work.

2. **Identify the callback need.** When a callback is required, confirm that the request is a callback before proceeding under this SOP.

3. **Apply the callback process.** Handle the callback according to the current approved callback SOP and record the applicable callback action in the company's normal operating record.

4. **Escalate uncertainty.** If the appropriate callback action is unclear or the current procedure does not address the situation, pause the callback workflow and refer the matter to Leadership for direction.

5. **Keep the version current.** Use this Version 3 procedure for callback work from March 28, 2026 onward. Replace it only when a subsequently approved callback SOP becomes effective.

## Document control

This document is the callback SOP, Version 3, effective March 28, 2026.
